notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateDrProtectionGroup returns a DrProtectionGroup body plus opc-work-request-id, GetDrProtectionGroup returns the full DrProtectionGroup body, ListDrProtectionGroups returns DrProtectionGroupSummary items, and UpdateDrProtectionGroup plus DeleteDrProtectionGroup return work-request headers only.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: DrProtectionGroup projects role, lifecycleState, lifecycleSubState, peerId, peerRegion, logLocation, and a polymorphic members array. The published runtime keeps that member discriminator truthfully surfaced instead of flattening members into opaque maps.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: UpdateDrProtectionGroupDetails only exposes displayName, logLocation, members, freeformTags, and definedTags for in-place mutation. compartmentId and create-time association therefore remain replacement-only drift, and associate/disassociate, role-change, compartment-move, DR plan, and broader member-action families stay out of scope for this first published rollout.

Pinned provider coverage is unconfirmed. formal/sources.lock still points at github.com/oracle/terraform-provider-oci@eb653febb1bab4cc6650a96d404a8baf36fdf671, but the checked-in onboarding audit did not confirm a matching DrProtectionGroup resource or datasource at that boundary. The providerResource and datasource names therefore stay provisional OCI-style placeholders so generator-owned registry artifacts can derive stable links without claiming verified provider coverage.

Repo-authored runtime semantics stay explicit: create, update, and delete resume through GetWorkRequest plus GetDrProtectionGroup rereads, list summaries are not treated as authoritative observed state because they omit members and logLocation, and required delete confirmation waits for either a terminal work request followed by a missing or DELETED resource.
